# Imported Research — 2026-04-21

External research materials collected prior to this date and imported
into the repo so they travel with the code. Files are kept in their
original form (PDF/DOCX/MD) to preserve provenance; see each file's
own header for authorship and date.

## Findings package

- `CONTENT_MACHINE_FINDINGS_AND_PLAN_2026-04-12.md` — dated findings and
  forward plan for content-machine (extracted from
  `content-machine-findings-package-2026-04-12.zip`).
- `content-machine-findings-package-2026-04-12.zip` — original package
  kept for archival integrity.

## Specifications

- `vibeforge-content-machine-spec-v0.2.docx` — VibeForge content-machine
  spec, v0.2.
- `machine-set-spec-content-machine-and-demo-machine.md` — deep-research
  report on the machine-set covering content-machine and demo-machine.

## Content strategy and formats

- `cross-platform-content-flywheel-research-repository.pdf` / `.docx` —
  cross-platform content flywheel research repository.
- `emerging-viral-short-form-content-formats-late-2025.pdf` — survey of
  emerging short-form formats in late 2025.
- `viral-low-effort-short-form-formats-15-60s.pdf` — catalog of
  low-effort viral formats at 15–60 second durations.
- `unique-game-content-and-creators.pdf` — notes on unique game content
  and creator archetypes.
- `r2-sprint-rapid-retrieval-90min-sop-new-content.pdf` — R2 sprint SOP
  for rapid retrieval of new content ideas (90-minute cycle).

## Evaluation and virality prediction

- `improving-video-evaluation-for-content-machine.pdf` — direction on
  improving the content-machine video evaluation stack.
- `ai-tools-predicting-video-retention-and-virality.pdf` / `.docx` —
  tooling survey for predicting retention and virality.

## Viral video research system v4

- `viral_video_research_system_v4/` — structured taxonomy, hypothesis
  library, methodology, experiment design, and playbooks for viral
  video research. Entry point: `viral_video_research_system_v4/README.md`.
- `viral_video_research_system_v4.zip` — original archive kept for
  archival integrity.
